visual: Nearly all weight on the rear bent leg while the front foot rests lightly with only the toe or heel touching the floor.
motion_description: From a starting posture with weight concentrated on the bent rear right leg and the left foot resting lightly forward, both arms slowly lower from an extended, shoulder-height position down to the sides of the hips in a steady, continuous flow. The torso remains upright and faces straight ahead with no discernible rotation. As the hands reach the sides of the body, the front left foot steps back to meet the right foot. Both legs then straighten to conclude the movement in a fully upright standing position.
